title: Process interaction diagram
description: Generates a Mermaid sequence diagram of how processes hand off work (client → broker → worker → store) from the log messages.

sections.name: ProcessDiagram
sections.description: Emit a sequence diagram from process-interaction log lines

rules.name: emit-process-sequence
rules.match: Client sending request to Broker|Broker dispatching to Worker|Worker writing result to Store|Broker responding to Client
